commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `delete payload.reasoning` to the enabled DeepSeek V4 OpenAI-compatible thinking wrapper in `src/plugin-sdk/provider-stream-shared.ts`.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main can build nested OpenRouter `reasoning`, then the DeepSeek V4 wrapper adds top-level `reasoning_effort` without removing the nested field. I did not live-hit OpenRouter in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Contributor should add redacted runtime logs, copied live output, a terminal screenshot, recording, or live OpenRouter proof to the PR body; private details such as API keys, IPs, phone numbers, and non-public endpoints should be redacted, and updating the body should trigger a fresh ClawSweeper review or a maintainer can comment `@clawsweeper re-review`.

target.title: fix(openrouter): drop nested reasoning when reasoning_effort is set for deepseek-v4 (#79957)
target.author: hclsys
